concerns.analysis: header_footer_count=5, pages_affected=5/5. Header/footer text from extraction JSON is present in the rendered HTML — the renderer failed to strip it. This is a structural accessibility issue.

In the extraction JSON, this text is rendered without any emphasis markdown or indication of underlining, resulting in visual emphasis loss.
